metadata.title: Stille
metadata.description: Focus on your writing, a section at a time.

regex.source: text: `If ${nameOfApplication} has helped you focus, consider buying me a slice of pizza \u{1F355} `
regex.target: text: `如果 ${nameOfApplication} 有帮到你, 那么就 \u{1F355} `

regex.source: text: "Buy Michael, a slice of pizza"

regex.target: .setName("未聚焦文本的不透明度级别")

regex.source: .setDesc("This is the opacity level for text that is unfocused. This value should be a decimal value from 0.0 to 1.0.")
regex.target: .setDesc("这是未聚焦文本的不透明度级别。这个值应该是一个从 0.0 到 1.0 的十进制数值。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`Use this to toggle the visibility of the status bar label for ${nameOfApplication}.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`使用这个来切换 ${nameOfApplication} 的状态栏标签的可见性。`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`Dim the title of the note when ${nameOfApplication} is on.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`当 “${nameOfApplication}” 开启时，调暗笔记的标题。`)
.setPlaceholder("这是一个从 0.0 到 1.0 的值")
